tasks.prompt: Sync docs to memory: Run /srv/monorepo/scripts/sync-memory.sh or similar to synchronize documentation changes to the memory index. Check git status for pending doc changes and update MEMORY.md index accordingly.
Modo dormir: Scan docs/SPECS/ for pending SPECs, generate or update tasks/pipeline.json using the pipeline-gen skill. Check for SPECs without tasks and update the project board.
Code review daily: Run /review on recent commits and changes. Generate REVIEW-*.md reports in docs/SPECS/reviews/ and submit via gh or save findings.
Test coverage check: Run test coverage analysis on the monorepo. Report any packages/apps with coverage below threshold. Update coverage metrics if possible.
Secrets audit: Run /se or secrets scan on recent commits. Check for hardcoded secrets, API keys, or credentials in the codebase. Report any findings.
MCP health check: Verify all MCP servers are responding. Check ai-context, gitea-access, coolify-access, and other MCP tools. Report any that are down.
Auto-healer: Check Coolify services status via coolify-access. Monitor for failed containers or services and attempt auto-restart if possible. Log any actions taken.
Resource monitor: Check system resources (disk, memory, CPU) on the homelab. Report if any thresholds are exceeded. Check ZFS pool status and backup completion.
